title: Add Rider
description: Adds a rider to the entity.

entity_type.title: Entity type to ride
entity_type.description: Type of entity to acquire as a rider

spawn_event.title: Spawn Event
spawn_event.description: Trigger event when a rider is acquired

riders.title: Riders
riders.description:
List of riders to be added to the entity. Can only spawn as many riders as "minecraft:rideable" has "seat_count".

Properties:
• entity_type (string)
• spawn_event (string) = 

Sample values:
• cave_spider: [{"entity_type":"minecraft:bogged"}]
• cave_spider: [{"entity_type":"minecraft:wither_skeleton"}]
